entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop providing food, fodder/forage and bio-fuel, specifically Sorghum bicolor (L.) Moench

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where postrainy sorghum is grown on residual moisture

entities.name: TERMINAL DROUGHT
entities.description: A stress condition faced by postrainy sorghum crops in India

entities.name: STAY-GREEN
entities.description: A post-flowering drought tolerance response characterized by delayed senescence

entities.name: PHOTOSYNTHETICALLY ACTIVE LEAF AREA
entities.description: The leaf area that remains active for photosynthesis during stress

entities.name: GRAIN FILLING
entities.description: The process of filling grains normally under stress

entities.name: STG1
entities.description: One of the six major QTLs mapped to the stay-green trait in sorghum

entities.description: One of the six major QTLs mapped to the stay-green trait in sorghum

entities.description: One of the six major QTLs mapped to the stay-green trait in sorghum

entities.description: One of the six major QTLs mapped to the stay-green trait in sorghum

entities.name: STGC
entities.description: One of the six major QTLs mapped to the stay-green trait in sorghum

entities.name: STG4
entities.description: One of the six major QTLs mapped to the stay-green trait in sorghum

entities.name: SGR
entities.description: A candidate gene responsible for the stay-green phenotype

entities.name: SGR1
entities.description: A homologous gene to SGR responsible for the stay-green phenotype

entities.name: NYE1/SGRL
entities.description: A homologous gene to SGR responsible for the stay-green phenotype

entities.name: PPH
entities.description: Pheophytin Pheophorbide Hydrolase, a candidate gene for stay-green phenotype

entities.name: PAO
entities.description: Pheophorbide a Oxygenase, a candidate gene for stay-green phenotype

entities.name: RCCR
entities.description: Red Chlorophyll Catabolite Reductase, a candidate gene for stay-green phenotype

entities.name: NYC
entities.description: Non-Yellow Coloring, a candidate gene for stay-green phenotype

entities.name: NOL
entities.description: NYC1-Like, a homologous gene to NYC responsible for stay-green phenotype

entities.name: HCAR
entities.description: 7-Hydroxymethyl Chlorophyll a Reductase, a candidate gene for stay-green phenotype

entities.name: ZEA MAYS
entities.description: Maize, a source of candidate genes for stay-green phenotype

entities.name: ARABIDOPSIS THALIANA
entities.description: A model plant used as a source for candidate genes and senescence associated genes

entities.name: ORZYA SATIVA
entities.description: Rice, a source of candidate genes and senescence associated genes

entities.name: SAG2
entities.description: A senescence associated gene from Arabidopsis thaliana and Orzya sativa

entities.description: A senescence associated gene from Arabidopsis thaliana and Orzya sativa

entities.name: SAG39
entities.description: A senescence associated gene from Arabidopsis thaliana and Orzya sativa

entities.name: SEQUENCE SIMILARITY SEARCH
entities.description: A method used to retrieve and compare sequence and functional information for genes

entities.name: RE-SEQUENCING DATA
entities.description: Data used to gain insight into QTL regions for improved drought tolerance

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand drought stress
